text.title: Multi Project Allocation Tracker Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example demonstrating a clean application of Multi Project Allocation Tracker, anchored to the schema in content/02-output-contract.xml.

example.title: Multi Project Allocation Tracker — clean application
example.note: mpat-2026-W21 — 8 people; olena-k over-allocated 1.1; proposal: defer nova phase-2 to W23; decision owner Iryna V.
